title: Sendinblue vs Sender (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Sendinblue vs Sender: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Sendinblue and Sender comes down to your specific use case. Sendinblue is built for transactional email and SMS campaigns, while Sender targets small businesses wanting a generous free plan.

comparison_table.tool_b: Small Businesses Wanting A Generous Free Plan

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and SMS campaigns
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting a generous free plan

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Sendinblue wins for transactional email and SMS campaigns, while Sender is stronger for small businesses wanting a generous free plan.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Sendinblue or Sender?
faq.a: Sender starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sender to Sendinblue?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
